title: Automation of Specific Item
excerpt: Is it possible to automate a specific item within a board? For example there’s the automation of making a new item when a status is changed. But it’s not like you always want the same exact item to be made for the same s…

posts.author: pazgilboa (Paz Gilboa)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to automate a specific item within a board? For example there’s the automation of making a new item when a status is changed. But it’s not like you always want the same exact item to be made for the same status change. It seems like you’d either have to setup a lot of different boards to keep things separate or make a ridiculous amount of statuses so that you can differentiate. I feel like it would make sense to be able to choose which items/tasks within a board you want the automation to run on and which you don’t.

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome to the community @pazgilboa !

While I don’t have a time frame for you, I do believe that there is something like this in development
